name: Ark 21Shares Bitcoin ETF
business: The Trust is an exchange-traded fund that issues common shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in its net assets. Its investment objective is to seek to track the performance of bitcoin, as measured by the performance of the Index, adjusted for the Trust's expenses and other liabilities. The Trust holds bitcoin at its Custodians and values its Shares daily based on the Index.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's investment objective is to seek to track the performance of bitcoin, as measured by the performance of the Index, adjusted for the Trust's expenses and other liabilities.
